title: CoverageResult
description: Summary statistics for an evaluation run. Aggregates match outcomes across all evaluated mutations to produce per-level counts and a coverage rate.

run_id.description: 16-character hex run identifier linking this result to the insert_me output bundle.

tool.description: Name of the detection tool whose report was evaluated.

evaluated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this evaluation was performed.

total_mutations.description: Total number of mutations from ground_truth.json.

matched.description: Number of mutations with match_level in (exact, family, semantic).

unmatched.description: Number of mutations with match_level == no_match.

false_positives.description: Number of detector findings not linked to any inserted mutation.

coverage_rate.description: Fraction of mutations that were matched (matched / total_mutations). 0 if total_mutations is 0.

exact.description: Mutations matched at the exact level (same file, CWE, line ±2).

family.description: Mutations matched at the family level (same CWE family group).

semantic.description: Mutations matched via keyword heuristic on finding message.
